title: Teach Stationary Camera Calibration Points
description:
This dialog is used for entering calibration target coordinates for stationary camera calibration.  You must enter data for all nine target points for calibration to work correctly.
  You must also observe the X and Y axis directions.  All coordinates are in millimeters.

It is recommended that you make one point (0.00, 0.00), such as in the lower left corner or in the center.  All of the other coordinates are then the distance from the zero point.

The calibration targets do not have to be exactly spaced apart, but it is important to enter the correct position coordinates.

After entering the point data, click OK to save the points in memory, or Cancel to abort.
